name: Ninestar Corporation
summary: Ninestar Corporation operates as an imaging products and service provider. Its principal products include laser printers, copiers, integrated circuit chips, replacement print consumables, and cartridge core components. The company was formerly known as Apex Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Ninestar Corporation in May 2017. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Zhuhai, the People's Republic of China.
